name: rs3-launcher-buddy
description: RS3 Launcher Buddy with OpenGL overlay library

scripts.build:apps: cd packages/rs3-tile-marker && npm install && npm run build && cd ../gl-debug-app && npm run build && cd ../npc-recorder && npm install && npm run build && cd ../shared-data && npm run build && cd ../inventory-learner && npm install && npm run build && cd ../vos-reader && npm run build && cd ../instance-tile-mapper && npm run build && cd ../.. && npm run copy:apps
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:apps && npm run build:launcher
scripts.package: npm run build:apps && cd launcher && npm run package
scripts.package:win: npm run build:apps && cd launcher && npm run package:win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:apps && cd launcher && npm run package:linux
scripts.package:all: npm run build:apps && cd launcher && npm run package:all
